category_sources: source_facts.description says libvirt is a C virtualization API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libvirt; source_facts.homepage is the official libvirt project site.
docs_sources: Official libvirt site provides a dedicated documentation section at /docs/.
repo_sources: Official libvirt downloads page states primary source repositories are in the libvirt GitLab group and lists the libvirt GitLab repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C virtualization API; source_facts.executables lists libvirtd, virsh, and other virtualization management tools.
